title: HerosUniversalPack
description: A modpack that was created to provide a good experience, whether it's survival or creative
body:
# 🎮 HerosUniversalPack
Welcome to HerosUniversalPack, a modpack designed for players who love exploring, building, and messing around in Minecraft with all the tools and features that make the game smoother, prettier, and just more fun – especially in Singleplayer or private SMPs with friends! 🏡👾

This pack offers a huge range of quality-of-life mods, performance boosts, and creative tools to customize your world exactly how you want it – whether you're building megabases, running mini-SMPs, or just vibing alone with shaders on.

## ⚠️ This modpack is not intended for public multiplayer servers. Some included mods can get you banned on strict anti-cheat servers – speaking from experience 😅 So stick to creative play, local worlds, or trusted friends.

## 📦 Mod Categories (Highlights)
### ⚙️ Performance & Visuals
Sodium • Lithium • FerriteCore • Entity Culling • Krypton • ImmediatelyFast • More Culling • Dynamic FPS • Bobby • Model Gap Fix • Borderless Fullscreen • Sodium Extra • Very Many Players

### 🎮 Gameplay & Creative Tools
Tweakeroo • Litematica • WorldEdit • Client Side Noteblocks • ElytraSwapper+ • Durability Tooltip • Camera Tweaks • Inventory Profiles Next • TotemCounter • Gamma Utils • EXP Counter • Skin Shuffle

### 🧩 UI, API & Backend
Fabric API • Cloth Config • Architectury • SuperMartijn642's Config Lib • Collective • YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) • Dark Loading Screen • FastQuit • Mod Menu

### 🗺️ Navigation & Voice
Xaero’s Minimap • Xaero’s World Map • Simple Voice Chat • Sound Physics Remastered • Melody

## 💡 Why use this pack?
⚡ Much better performance than vanilla

🛠️ Tons of tweaks for building, flying, organizing

✨ Shader support for epic visuals

🧍 Perfect for Singleplayer or friendly SMPs

# ❌ Not meant for anti-cheat-heavy public servers 
# use at own risk
your favorite Modpack creator HeroOfCrafting_
